title: The Bills of Lading Act, 2025
full_text: The Bills of Lading Act, 2025 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 2025-18 Act Number: 18 Enactment Date: 2025-06-17 Act Year: 2025 Short Title: The Bills of Lading Act, 2025 Long Title: An Act to make provisions for the transfer of rights of suit and all liabilities to the consignee named in a bill of lading and every endorsee of a bill of lading, to whom the property in the goods mentioned in the bill of lading shall pass, upon or by reason of a consignment or an endorsement, and for matters connected therewith or related thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Ports, Shipping And Waterways TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Bills of Lading Act, 2025 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Rights under bills of lading to vest in consignee or endorsee. Section 3. Right of stoppage in transit or claims for freight not to be affected. Section 4. Bill of lading in hands of consignee, etc., conclusive evidence of shipment as against master, etc. Section 5. Power of Central Government to give directions. Section 6. Repeal and savings.
